---
title: "precision"
generated: true
description: "Inverse covariance (precision) matrix."
---

[â€ą back to `nitrix.stats.covariance`](../nitrix-stats-covariance.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:precision -->
```python
precision(X: Num[Array, '... c obs'], *, require_nonsingular: bool = True, **kwargs) -> Num[Array, '... c c']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:precision -->
Inverse covariance (precision) matrix.

Estimates the covariance via [`cov`](../nitrix-stats-covariance/cov.qmd), then inverts it.  Both
inversion routes go through the robust `safe_*` linear-algebra
wrappers (with an adaptive CPU fallback on GPU stacks where the
vendor solver is broken) rather than a raw `jnp.linalg.inv` /
`jnp.linalg.pinv`.  For the per-element / sparse-precision route
see [`glasso`](../nitrix-stats-connectivity/glasso.qmd); this function is
the dense, once-per-matrix estimator.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:precision -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `X` | `Num` | `...` Ă— `c` Ă— `obs` | â€” | Sample tensor; see [`cov`](../nitrix-stats-covariance/cov.qmd). |
| `require_nonsingular` | `bool` | â€” | `True` | If `True` (default), use a dense matrix inverse, which fails on a singular covariance. If `False`, use the symmetric eigen-truncated Moore-Penrose pseudoinverse. Pass `l2 > 0` via `kwargs` to regularise rather than rely on the pseudoinverse for rank-deficient cases. |
| `**kwargs` | `Any` | â€” | `{}` | â€” |

**Returns** `Num` â€” shape `...` Ă— `c` Ă— `c`. Precision (inverse covariance) matrix, `(..., c, c)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:precision -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks â€” nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **363.4 Âµs** (median, L4); up to **307.61Ă— faster** than `nilearn.precision`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_PRECISION.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| precision | jax-cpu | c=128,obs=1024 | `cupy.inv_cov` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| precision | jax-cpu | c=128,obs=1024 | `nilearn.precision` | ok | 96.18 ms / 184.12 ms | 1.666 s | 754 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.91Ă—tol | 135.46x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cpu | c=128,obs=1024 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 710.0 Âµs / 858.0 Âµs | 235.96 ms | 754 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.0014Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cpu | c=128,obs=1024 | `numpy.inv_cov` | ok | 748.1 Âµs / 770.2 Âµs | 802.1 Âµs | 754 MB (rss) | âś“ 9.9e-05Ă—tol | 1.05x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=128,obs=1024 | `cupy.inv_cov` | ok | 714.6 Âµs / 732.3 Âµs | 1.148 s | 0.52 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00072Ă—tol | 2.02x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=128,obs=1024 | `nilearn.precision` | ok | 109.02 ms / 182.05 ms | 944.10 ms | 0.52 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.91Ă—tol | 307.61x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=128,obs=1024 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 354.4 Âµs / 363.4 Âµs | 608.09 ms | 72.88 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00075Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=128,obs=1024 | `numpy.inv_cov` | ok | 757.6 Âµs / 772.9 Âµs | 483.13 ms | 0.52 MB (hbm) | âś“ 9.9e-05Ă—tol | 2.14x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cpu | c=256,obs=2048 | `cupy.inv_cov` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| precision | jax-cpu | c=256,obs=2048 | `nilearn.precision` | ok | 172.35 ms / 293.76 ms | 1.086 s | 754 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.45Ă—tol | 15.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cpu | c=256,obs=2048 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 11.49 ms / 40.94 ms | 496.70 ms | 754 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.0017Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cpu | c=256,obs=2048 | `numpy.inv_cov` | ok | 4.09 ms / 30.30 ms | 59.26 ms | 754 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.0001Ă—tol | 0.36x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=256,obs=2048 | `cupy.inv_cov` | ok | 1.37 ms / 1.40 ms | 231.96 ms | 2.10 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00077Ă—tol | 2.23x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=256,obs=2048 | `nilearn.precision` | ok | 123.27 ms / 197.66 ms | 1.516 s | 2.10 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.45Ă—tol | 200.86x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=256,obs=2048 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 613.7 Âµs / 632.6 Âµs | 598.71 ms | 77.59 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00091Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=256,obs=2048 | `numpy.inv_cov` | ok | 3.85 ms / 4.88 ms | 3.94 ms | 2.10 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.0001Ă—tol | 6.28x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cpu | c=512,obs=4096 | `cupy.inv_cov` | skipped | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” | â€” |
| precision | jax-cpu | c=512,obs=4096 | `nilearn.precision` | ok | 476.51 ms / 578.92 ms | 1.674 s | 754 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.23Ă—tol | 17.82x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cpu | c=512,obs=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 26.75 ms / 32.18 ms | 362.89 ms | 754 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.0012Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cpu | c=512,obs=4096 | `numpy.inv_cov` | ok | 26.25 ms / 35.01 ms | 44.74 ms | 754 MB (rss) | âś“ 0.00011Ă—tol | 0.98x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=512,obs=4096 | `cupy.inv_cov` | ok | 6.79 ms / 6.82 ms | 323.32 ms | 8.39 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.0011Ă—tol | 4.25x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=512,obs=4096 | `nilearn.precision` | ok | 381.26 ms / 486.72 ms | 1.131 s | 8.39 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.23Ă—tol | 238.51x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=512,obs=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.60 ms / 1.61 ms | 573.86 ms | 88.08 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.0012Ă—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| precision | jax-cuda12 | c=512,obs=4096 | `numpy.inv_cov` | ok | 190.09 ms / 1.434 s | 1.396 s | 8.39 MB (hbm) | âś“ 0.00011Ă—tol | 118.92x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `a1af688c` Â· nitrix `d0a9ca5f`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:precision -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `c` | feature channels (channels-last) |
| `obs` | *(undocumented â€” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
